name: Medic Care
title: Medic Care Bootstrap 5 CSS Template
description: Medical healthcare single-page template built with Bootstrap 5. Fixed top navbar with centered brand logo flanked by nav links (Home, About, Timeline, Testimonials, Booking, Contact). Hero section features a 3-slide image carousel with doctor/medical photos, overlaid by a white text panel at bottom-right showing animated rotating text with a CTA link and phone number. About section in 2-column layout with doctor bio and a large circular badge (350px) displaying years of experience. Full-width 2-column gallery with medical images. Vertical timeline section with 5 alternating entries using Bootstrap Icons. Owl Carousel testimonials with star ratings, patient photo and name. Booking form with name, email, phone, date, and message fields. Footer with opening hours list, clinic address, and social icon links.

typography.style: Light body text with bold headings, clean medical professional feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 5 container-based layout. Fixed top navbar. Hero carousel at 580px height with absolute-positioned text overlay. Sections use 7rem vertical padding. Timeline uses alternating row layout with icons.
visualStyle: Clean, professional medical aesthetic with white background, blue accents, and generous spacing. Circular experience badge and vertical timeline create visual interest.

name: Medic
title: Medic | Medical HTML Template
description: Medical and healthcare website with light theme and teal accent. Hero slider with full-width background images, overlay text, and CTA buttons. Top header with contact info (phone, email, address) and social icons. Sticky navigation with logo and multi-page menu (Home, About, Service, Gallery, Team, Appointment, Blogs, Contact) with mega dropdown. CTA section with emergency contact info. Feature section with 3 icon cards on gray background. Service tab section with tabbed content showing medical services. Services section with icon cards in grid. Team section with doctor cards showing photos, names, specialties, and social links. Testimonial section with carousel. Appointment form section with date/time inputs. Footer with 4 columns and bottom bar.

typography.style: Clean professional sans-serif dual-font, medical/healthcare feel

layoutDetails: Bootstrap container grid, full-width hero slider, tabbed services, doctor card grid, appointment form, responsive at many breakpoints from 1920px to 350px
visualStyle: Professional medical website with teal accents, hero slider, doctor cards, appointment form, and healthcare aesthetic

name: Novena
title: Novena- Health Care & Medical template
description: Healthcare and medical services template with a top utility bar showing contact info and social links, followed by a clean header with logo and navigation for Home, About, Services, Department, Doctors, Blog, and Contact. A large hero banner features a headline, description text, and CTA button. Below, a horizontal feature block displays three service cards with icons. An about section pairs an image with descriptive text. A dark blue CTA section with counter stats uses a background image overlay. Services are shown in a grid of icon cards on a gray background. An appointment form section allows scheduling. Testimonials display in a carousel. A client logo row and a gray footer with contact info and subscription form complete the page.
layoutDetails: Full-width sections stacked vertically. Feature blocks use horizontal flex layout. Services in 3-column grid. Counter stats in 4-column row. Alternating white and gray section backgrounds with a dark blue CTA overlay section.
visualStyle: Professional medical with navy blue primary and pink-red accent. Clean white spaces, rounded icon containers, subtle gray backgrounds. Trustworthy and clinical aesthetic.

typography.style: Clean medical typography with Exo for headings, Roboto for body text

name: Health
title: Health - Medical Website Template
description: Medical and health center template built on Bootstrap 3 with a clean, professional design. Opens with a preloader animation, then reveals a fixed navigation bar. The hero section features a full-width slider with three slides promoting healthy living. An about section introduces the health center with a doctor profile. The team section displays three doctor cards with photos, names, specialties, and contact info, set against a parallax background. A news section shows three article cards with dates, titles, and excerpts. An appointment section features a booking form with date, time, and department selection. A Google Maps section embeds an interactive map. The footer includes contact information, opening hours, newsletter signup, and social links with stellar parallax scrolling.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with light body weight. Bold uppercase headings. Blue accent for links and buttons.

layoutDetails: Fixed top navigation. Full-width hero carousel. Two-column about section. Three-column team cards with parallax background. Three-column news cards. Appointment form. Embedded Google Map. Multi-column footer.
visualStyle: Clean medical/healthcare aesthetic. White background with sky blue accent. Parallax scrolling backgrounds on alternating sections. Card-based team and news layouts.
